title: dryopteris holophylla
intro: Dryopteris holophylla, also known as the Chinese shield fern or Two-pinnate Wood fern, is a species of fern native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and improving digestion. Dryopteris holophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
